title: spartina stricta
intro: Spartina stricta, also known as salt grass or little salt grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to the coastal regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spartina stricta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Spartina stricta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis and sore throats.
